name: Arkaia: The Enigmatic Isle
short_description: Arkaia is an indie first-person adventure game for PC, Mac and Linux. Piece together an original and epic story while solving puzzles and exploring an interesting and fantastical environment.
detailed_description:
A Note on Arkaia: The Enigmatic Isle

Arkaia: The Enigmatic Isle is my first published game. As such, your patience and forgiveness in regards to the inevitable rough edges is greatly appreciated.

Furthermore, Arkaia is very short. It's intended to be a "chapter one" in a episodic series that will tell the whole story.

As such, I've set the price for Arkaia quite low, a price which I believe is fair. I have put a lot of blood, sweat and tears into Arkaia, but I want to respect your time and money as well. I want you to feel comfortable taking a chance on this small game, and I hope you enjoy it too!


About the Game

Arkaia is an indie first-person adventure game for PC, Mac and Linux. Piece together an original and epic story while solving puzzles and exploring an interesting and fantastical environment.

Arkaia is planned to be released in an episodic manner, starting with "The Enigmatic Isle" and eventually at least two more chapters in order to complete the story.

Arkaia is really a love letter to the Myst games that we hold very dear. Myst and its sequels set the standard for immersive, challenging experiences, and we will never forget the feeling of exploring those Ages! So we decided to make an homage to those amazing games, while presenting a fresh new narrative that is sure to hook you.

So come into the world of Arkaia, and feel free to look around…
